highlights.headline: A file access error prevents the mod from updating while the game process is active.
evidence: Windows error popup appearing over game UI
Repetitive clicking on the same mod entry

highlights.headline: other issue: Error pop-up message: 'Failed to join: installed mods do not match the session's mods you're trying to join
evidence: Error pop-up message: 'Failed to join: installed mods do not match the session's mods you're trying to join.'
Scene: Loading screen after attempting to join a multiplayer lobby.

highlights.headline: Technical hurdles became too disruptive for the live broadcast.
evidence: Display of 'Be Right Back' text on screen
Cursor moving off-screen to the streaming software

highlights.headline: Unclear logic regarding which mod version (Updated vs. Downgraded) is required for the multiplayer lobby.
evidence: Menu spam (rapidly opening and closing the same sub-menu)
Scrolling through long mod descriptions looking for fix instructions

highlights.headline: The player is forced to repeat mundane exploration tasks because progress was lost during the earlier technical crashes.
evidence: Retracing steps through the bloody courtyard
Scene: Courtyard of Rosymorn Monastery, looting containers previously cleared before the session crashes.

highlights.headline: ui rendering issue: Version mismatch for 'FaerunColors' and 'Fate Series Archer' mods, Mandatory update progress bar dur
evidence: Version mismatch for 'FaerunColors' and 'Fate Series Archer' mods
Scene: Mod Verification screen after attempting to rejoin the lobby.

highlights.headline: Ambiguity in which residual files are causing the 'Failed to Join' error from the previous segment.
evidence: Scene: Locating mod files in the local directory.

highlights.headline: 4 attempts at ruin_navigation_jumps, outcome: succeeded
evidence: Attempt 1: failed (Determined; the player is looking for a path down that avoids fall damage.)
Attempt 2: failed (Slight frustration, muttering 'damn it' as the jump path is blocked by environment geometry.)
Attempt 3: succeeded (Relief; manages to land a character on the mid-level ledge.)
Attempt 4: succeeded (Neutral; successfully jumps the rest of the party into the interior room.)

highlights.headline: Does that mean we're gonna have to retrace our steps again? Because we hadn't saved after grabbing that... probably.
evidence: Actionable: Automatically trigger a checkpoint save upon the acquisition of unique or quest-critical items to protect player progress from technical failures.

one_line_verdict: A file access error prevents the mod from updating while the game process is active.
